news_items.headline: Jays Lose To Marlins
news_items.summary: Marlins 8 Jays 2 That was just pathetic. I don’t really want to recap that, but….the Jays have had a lot of poor defensive outfielders, but Yohendrick Piñango had what must be one of the worst defensive games in team history. He seems to be scared to take charge. Scared to call ‘mine’ and go […]
